Manages boot bits, software failure, firmware storage, hexdumps, logging, assertions, profiling, reboot reasons, resets, RTC registers, status codes, syscalls, test infrastructure, and versioning.


## Files
- **[bootbits.c](bootbits.c.md)**: Manages boot bits and versioning for different microcontroller families with CRC validation.
- **[bootbits.h](bootbits.h.md)**: Defines boot bit values and functions for managing boot state in the Pebble firmware.
- **[die.c](die.c.md)**: Handles software failure by disabling vibration, logging, and resetting the system.
- **[die.h](die.h.md)**: Declares a function to handle software failure resets without setting a reboot reason.
- **[firmware_storage.c](firmware_storage.c.md)**: Functions for reading and validating firmware descriptions from flash storage.
- **[firmware_storage.h](firmware_storage.h.md)**: Utilities for reading and validating firmware images stored in flash memory.
- **[hexdump.c](hexdump.c.md)**: Functions for logging and displaying hexdump data through various output methods.
- **[hexdump.h](hexdump.h.md)**: Functions and macros for logging hexdumps with different output methods and levels.
- **[logging.h](logging.h.md)**: Header file for logging functionality, including log levels, color definitions, and macros for logging operations.
- **[passert.c](passert.c.md)**: Implements assertion handling and fault triggering for the Pebble firmware system.
- **[passert.h](passert.h.md)**: Assertion macros and functions for error handling and logging in the Pebble firmware.
- **[profiler.c](profiler.c.md)**: Implements a system profiler for tracking and reporting execution time and CPU usage in firmware.
- **[profiler.h](profiler.h.md)**: Header file for setting up and controlling a profiler in the Pebble firmware system.
- **[profiler_list.h](profiler_list.h.md)**: Defines a list of profiler nodes for timing specific operations in the system.
- **[reboot_reason.c](reboot_reason.c.md)**: Manages reboot reasons and related data storage for different microcontroller families.
- **[reboot_reason.h](reboot_reason.h.md)**: Defines reboot reason codes and structures, and functions to set, get, and clear reboot reasons.
- **[reset.h](reset.h.md)**: Functions for preparing, executing, and finalizing system resets in the firmware.
- **[rtc_registers.h](rtc_registers.h.md)**: Defines and manages retained registers for RTC operations, with conditional support for NRF5 microcontrollers.
- **[status_codes.h](status_codes.h.md)**: Defines global status codes and related macros for system operations.
- **[syscalls.c](syscalls.c.md)**: Implements memory manipulation functions for ARM EABI, including memcpy, memmove, memset, and memclr.
- **[testinfra.c](testinfra.c.md)**: Functions for system communication readiness and board quarantine in the Pebble firmware.
- **[testinfra.h](testinfra.h.md)**: Functions for notifying system readiness and handling board quarantine in a testing framework.
- **[version.c](version.c.md)**: Manages firmware version metadata, including retrieval and copying of version information.
- **[version.h](version.h.md)**: Functions for copying and retrieving firmware version metadata and build ID information.
